title: Enterprise Feature Adoption Platform
summary: Built an in-app guidance layer that helped hospital admins discover underused capabilities and drove measurable adoption across enterprise accounts.

sections.heading: The Problem
sections.body: Enterprise customers paid for a full platform but used less than 40% of available modules. Sales promised capabilities that CS couldn't train at scale. Churn risk increased among accounts with low feature breadth.

sections.heading: Discovery
sections.body: I shadowed 8 CS onboarding calls and analyzed product telemetry by account tier. Admins needed contextual nudges—not another PDF playbook. We validated concepts with 5 design partners before committing engineering capacity.

sections.caption: Contextual prompts triggered by usage patterns and role-based goals

sections.heading: My Approach
sections.body: Defined an adoption score per account, prioritized prompts by revenue impact, and shipped a rules engine MVP in one quarter. Partnered with data science on propensity models and with legal on HIPAA-safe messaging.

sections.heading: Outcome
sections.body: Feature adoption increased 41% across pilot accounts, enterprise NPS rose 12 points, and expansion revenue in the cohort grew 9% year-over-year.
